description: A business development manager needs to identify the best locations to install new public DC fast chargers.

nodes.task_description: Analyze traffic flow data and identify major commuter and travel corridors.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent highlights three major highways as potential areas.

nodes.task_description: Identify locations with existing amenities like retail stores and restaurants along these corridors.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a list of potential host sites (e.g., shopping centers).

nodes.task_description: Check grid capacity at the potential host sites to ensure they can support a bank of fast chargers.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent filters the list to sites with sufficient grid power.

nodes.task_description: Rank the top 5 most promising sites based on a combined score of traffic, amenities, and grid access.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent delivers a prioritized list of target locations.
